# Skill Discovery Audit (heuristic)

> HEURISTIC, NOT A RUNTIME TEST. This report is a static, token-overlap
> proxy for "would the right skill trigger." It does not run a model and
> does not prove discovery behavior. Treat every result below as a signal,
> not a guarantee. The authoritative check is the owner live smoke test
> described in PORT_NOTES.md.

Generated by `scripts/build-codex.mjs`. Skills audited: 102.

## Fixture: representative prompt to expected skill

For each prompt, every emitted description is scored by token overlap
(stopwords removed) and ranked. "In top 3" means the expected skill landed
among the three highest-scoring descriptions. This is a discrimination
proxy only.

| Prompt | Expected skill | Rank | In top 3 | Top 3 candidates (score) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| write a creative brief to kick off a new website project | `creative-brief` | 1 | yes | creative-brief (7), brand-discovery (4), art-direction (3) |
| audit the on-page SEO of this page: title tags, meta description, header structure | `seo-onpage` | 1 | yes | seo-onpage (9), seo-technical (4), content-brief-authoring (3) |
| choose a brand archetype and personality system for our company | `brand-archetype-system` | 4 | NO | brand-identity (3), brand-voice (3), creative-brief-selector (3) |
| review my web app code for bugs and security issues before merging a PR | `code-review-web` | 1 | yes | code-review-web (9), security-baseline (5), performance-optimization (3) |
| run a WCAG accessibility audit and fix the accessibility issues | `accessibility-audit` | 1 | yes | accessibility-audit (6), performance-optimization (3), qa-testing (3) |
| improve Core Web Vitals, LCP and reduce JavaScript bundle size | `performance-optimization` | 1 | yes | performance-optimization (8), seo-technical (4), accessibility-audit (1) |
| design an A/B test experiment with a clear hypothesis | `experiment-design` | 22 | NO | cro-optimization (4), beta-program-management (3), ads-creative-development (2) |
| write a blog post and edit the copy for voice and clarity | `content-and-copy` | 1 | yes | content-and-copy (7), brand-voice (3), editorial-qa (2) |

## Low-confidence prompts

These prompts did NOT place the expected skill in the top 3. This often
means several skills share overlapping vocabulary (a near-synonym
cluster), not that discovery is broken. Worth a human look:

- "choose a brand archetype and personality system for our company" expected `brand-archetype-system` (rank 4); top 3: brand-identity (3), brand-voice (3), creative-brief-selector (3)
- "design an A/B test experiment with a clear hypothesis" expected `experiment-design` (rank 22); top 3: cro-optimization (4), beta-program-management (3), ads-creative-development (2)

## Flagged descriptions

### Thin (empty or under ~40 chars)
None.

### Missing an explicit use cue

No "use when / use this / triggers on" style phrasing detected. These
descriptions are written as prose summaries; adding an explicit trigger
cue in the source skill would sharpen discovery. (Source is read-only here.)
- `experiment-design`
- `experimentation-analytics`
- `feature-flagging`

### Duplicate descriptions (identical full text)
None.

### Shared identical first sentence
None.
